verdict: Lead volume is strong and cheap, but Instagram following and conversion-to-client tracking remain blind spots.
diagnosis: Instagram lead campaign delivered 110 leads at roughly $20 each this period — well below the $72-$164 legal benchmark.

signals.headline: 110 leads at $20 each
signals.detail: Spent $2,246 to generate 110 leads this period. Cost per lead is roughly a third of the typical legal benchmark.

signals.headline: 655 landing page views, 110 leads
signals.detail: About 1 in 6 landing page visitors became a lead this period. Solid form conversion for a cold social audience.

signals.headline: 109 phone calls from Google profile
signals.detail: Local listing drove 109 calls this period with zero direction requests. Phone is the dominant intake channel.

signals.headline: 5.0 star rating across 61 reviews
signals.detail: Reputation is excellent and a new five-star review landed this period. Strong trust signal for paid traffic.

signals.headline: Only 26 Instagram followers
signals.detail: Despite 34,263 people reached, the profile gained almost no followers. Ads are working but the organic presence is not.

benchmark.label: Benchmark
benchmark.subheader: Legal cost per lead on Meta
benchmark.body: Legal sits among the priciest verticals on Meta. Reported medians range from $72 to $164 per lead, with some 2026 projections near $21. This campaign's ~$20 cost per lead is at or below the best-case range.

seasonal.label: Seasonal
seasonal.body: Spring tax season and post-holiday credit card balances typically drive higher consumer interest in debt and collections relief. Demand for Fair Debt Collection help tends to climb April through June.

competitor.label: Competitor
competitor.subheader: Firms shift toward Google Local Services
competitor.body: Consumer law firms increasingly pair Meta ads with Google Local Services Ads, where you pay per lead and earn a Google Screened badge. Roughly 79% of legal consumers hire the first responsive attorney.

recommendations.title: Track which leads become signed clients
recommendations.detail: Consider tagging the 110 leads in the CRM by outcome. Knowing the lead-to-client rate turns a $20 lead cost into a real cost-per-case number.

recommendations.title: Test Google Local Services Ads alongside Instagram
recommendations.detail: Worth exploring a small Google Local Services test. It pays per lead with the Google Screened badge, and the 5.0 star profile would rank well.

recommendations.title: Tighten phone response speed
recommendations.detail: Calls drove 109 contacts this period. Test how fast staff answer and call back missed calls — speed is the single biggest conversion lever in legal intake.
